# Shrirang Mahajan

> Machine Learning Engineer based in Pune, India. Currently ML Engineer II
> at Skylark Labs. Trains LLMs from scratch (TinyGPT — 95M params on a
> single RTX 3070 Ti), writes CUDA kernels by hand (Tensorax — `pip install
> tensorax`), and ships production ML systems with real throughput wins
> (2× via TensorRT + Triton, 3× via distributed annotation).

This site has two equivalent views: a modern editorial-paper design at
the root, and a Jupyter-notebook-styled view at `/jupyter`. Both render
the same underlying content.

## About

- [Home](https://www.shrirangmahajan.in/): one-page overview — approach,
  selected work, writing, experience, and a grounded site assistant.
- [Experience](https://www.shrirangmahajan.in/experience/): full work
  history with dates, scope, and impact for each role.
- [Contact](https://www.shrirangmahajan.in/contact/): email and social
  links. Best response on weekdays, IST.

## Featured

- [TinyGPT](https://www.shrirangmahajan.in/tinygpt): A 95M-parameter LLM
  pretrained from scratch on ~6.5B tokens of OpenWebText with a single
  RTX 3070 Ti, instruction-tuned on Stanford Alpaca, converted to ONNX,
  and runnable in-browser via WebGPU/WASM. Architecture details, training
  setup, conversion pipeline, and a live demo.

## Selected work

- [Projects index](https://www.shrirangmahajan.in/projects/): complete list,
  filterable by domain (ML, Web, App Dev). Includes Tensorax (CUDA kernel
  library on PyPI), QuillGPT (LLM fine-tuning), LoomRAG (multimodal RAG),
  Sonnet (LangChain chatbots), and more.

## Writing

- [All posts](https://www.shrirangmahajan.in/blogs/): essays on transformer
  internals, LLM pretraining, CUDA kernels, and multimodal models.
- [Pretraining a 95M LLM on a Consumer GPU](https://www.shrirangmahajan.in/blogs/pretraining-95m-llm-consumer-gpu)
- [Writing CUDA Kernels from Scratch — a Beginner's Guide](https://www.shrirangmahajan.in/blogs/writing-cuda-kernels-from-scratch-a-beginner's-guide)
- [Attention Explained Layer-by-Layer](https://www.shrirangmahajan.in/blogs/attention-and-the-versions-of-it-layer-by-layer)
- [Attention is All You Need — explained](https://www.shrirangmahajan.in/blogs/attention-explanation-is-all-you-need)
- [Llama 2 Explained](https://www.shrirangmahajan.in/blogs/llama-2-explained)
- [Llama 4 — the Natively Multimodal AI](https://www.shrirangmahajan.in/blogs/llama-4-the-natively-multimodal-ai)
- [From Words to Meaning: Word Vectors → Learnable Embeddings](https://www.shrirangmahajan.in/blogs/from-words-to-meaning:-the-journey-from-word-vectors-to-learnable-embeddings)

## Optional

- [Jupyter mode](https://www.shrirangmahajan.in/jupyter): the same site
  rendered as a Jupyter notebook — every section is a cell, the TinyGPT
  cell runs real inference with an editable prompt and generation params.
- [Sitemap](https://www.shrirangmahajan.in/sitemap.xml)
- [Repository](https://github.com/NotShrirang/shrirangmahajan.in): source
  code for this site.
